series.curator_notes: Split from Hanni und Nanni. These are modern 2025-2026 re-recordings labeled 'Neue Abenteuer' with different voice cast, different track structure (22 tracks with intro/outro vs 40 short parts), and modern production. They are distinct products that should be a separate series entry.
